'''ngashïfyïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibering|fibering]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-sh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibering|fibering]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| ngashïfyïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || ngæshïfyïfth || ngæshïfyïfj || ngæshïfyïfsh || ngæshïfyïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || ngashïfshïfyïfth || ngashïfshïfyïfj || ngashïfshïfyïfsh || ngashïfshïfyïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || ngashïfyïfth || ngashïfyïfj || ngashïfyïfsh || ngashïfyïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || ngashïffyïffth || ngashïffyïffj || ngashïffyïffsh || ngashïffyïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || ngashïfyïfïf || ngashïfyïfïf || ngashïfyïfïf || ngashïfyïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || ngashïfyïfth || ngashïfyïfj || ngashïfyïfsh || ngashïfyïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || ngashïfyïfïfl || ngashïfyïfïfl || ngashïfyïfïfl || ngashïfyïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || ngashïfyïfïfïf || ngashïfyïfïfïf || ngashïfyïfïfïf || ngashïfyïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || ngashïfyïfïfn || ngashïfyïfïfn || ngashïfyïfïfn || ngashïfyïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || ngashïfyïfïforo || ngashïfyïfïforo || ngashïfyïfïforo || ngashïfyïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
